qids.prose: An operating system contains user processes each requiring units of resource . The minimum number of units of such that no deadlocks will ever arise is A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A computer has six tape drives, with processes competing for them. Each process may need two drives. What is the maximum value of for the system to be deadlock free? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: Which of the following is not a valid deadlock prevention scheme? A. Release all resources before requesting a new resource. B. Number the resources uniquely and never request a lower numbered resource than the last one requested. C. Never request a resource after releasing any resource. D. Request
